name: Celery Sticks/Blue Cheese Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the crumbled blue cheese, sour cream, and skim milk in a ramekin or small bowl.
2. Wash and cut the celery stalks into 6-inch pieces.
3. Place the dip bowl on a serving platter surrounded by the celery sticks.
Per serving: 75 calories, 5 g protein, 2 g fat. Jo Merrill-personal files
